Step outside and activate The First Step grace.
Optional: Exhaust Varre's dialogue in front of the grace.
Pick up the Small Golden Effigy on the martyr effigy just east below the grace.
Run for the church past the Tree Sentinel and pick up the Golden Rune [2] in front of the entrance.
Activate the Church of Elleh grace and pick up the Smithing Stone [1] on the anvil.
Talk to Kale and purchase the Crafting Kit for 300 runes to unlock Item Crafting. Optionally, talk to him about himself.
Head toward the ruin east of the church to pick up a Golden Rune [1] near three gibbets.
Explore the woods on the opposite side of the ruin to find Kukri x4 in front of a broken-down wagon.
Follow the dirt path through the woods to a ruins site, then head toward the large gate on the left to discover the Gatefront grace.
Rest at the Gatefront grace to meet Melina. Accept her request to receive the Spectral Steed Whistle (your mount) and the ability to level up.
Fast travel to the Church of Elleh to meet Ranni, presenting herself as Renna. Tell her you can call the spectral steed to receive Spirit Calling Bell and Lone Wolf Ashes.
Note: If missed, they can be bought from the Twin Maiden Husks in Roundtable Hold.
Optional: Exhaust Melina's dialogue while resting at the Church of Elleh grace.
Optional: Return to Gatefront and talk to Melina at the grace to learn about her purpose.
Head through the gate and grab the Lump of Flesh on the road and the Golden Rune [1] behind some spiked barricades on the right.
Continue up the road until you see a Golden Seed on the right.
On the grassy hillside east-northeast of the tree, you'll find some chairs with Smithing Stone [1] x3.
Continue toward the gibbets near the cliff east-southeast from the chairs. Behind the second last gibbet, you'll find Smoldering Butterfly x5.
North of the gibbets lies a cemetery with 4x Golden Rune [1], 2x Golden Rune [2], Golden Rune [3], and a Golden Rune [5].
From the cemetery, head west to find a shack by the road. Grab the Stormhill Shack grace, then pick up the Stonesword Key on the elevated platform.
MISSABLE: Talk to Roderika in the shack to learn the Sitting Sideways gesture, then exhaust her dialogue for the Spirit Jellyfish Ashes.
Head up the slope to the left of a half-buried ruin near the shack to find Strength-knot Crystal Tear guarded by a Troll.
Return to the grace and follow the dirt path to the right of the ruin to a corpse with Fire Arrow x5.
Continue into the woods and activate the Warmaster's Shack grace on the right.
Talk to Bernahl in the shack to unlock his inventory; it doesn't matter what you answer. Optionally, select "Talk".
Behind the shack is a hillside with five Trolls. Pick up Beast Liver in front of the Troll near a ruin.
Bait the troll into attacking the statue in the middle to obtain Smithing Stone [1] x5, and a Smithing Stone [2].
Continue east from the statue and jump down the spiritspring below the cliff. Turn north at the bottom to find a Smithing Stone [1] on a ledge.
Return to Warmaster's Shack and ride northeast through the woods to a camp with Exalted Flesh and a chest containing the Beast Crest Heater Shield.

MISSABLE: Exit the camp and head up the ledge on the right side to find Alexander. Select "Help him out" first, then free him for the Triumphant Delight gesture. Talk to him afterward to receive an Exalted Flesh.
Return to the path below the ledge and continue downhill to discover the Saintsbridge grace.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] x2 in front of a broken statue on the bridge.
On the right side past the bridge, you'll find the Nomadic Merchant (North Limgrave).
Head south from the merchant to find a Golden Rune [1] beneath some gibbets near the cliff.
Optional: Return to the merchant and continue along the path to encounter D, Hunter of the Dead on the left side.
Continue down the path to discover the Summonwater Village Outskirts grace on the right side.
Requires 1 Stonesword Key: Unlock the imp seal near some turtles in the right side of the village. Loot the chest in the cellar to obtain the Green Turtle Talisman.
Head toward the cliff south of the seal. Drop down near the scarab to reach a cemetery with 5x Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], and a Golden Rune [5].
Follow the northeast wall to a spiritspring and use it while facing northeast to find a tunnel entrance. Go inside and grab the Rear Gael Tunnel Entrance grace.
Optional: Talk to Alexander in the tunnel, then pick up the Smithing Stone [4] on the wall behind him.
Exit the tunnel and follow the downhill path to a broken-down wagon. Pick up the Neutralizing Boluses next to it.
Continue downhill and kill the scarab near a spiritspring to obtain Ash of War: Sacred Blade.
Enter the church at the bottom and activate the Third Church of Marika grace.
Pick up the Crimson Crystal Tear and Flask of Wondrous Physick from the stone basin, then the Sacred Tear in front of the statue.
Optional: Talk to Melina at the grace and add some Crystal Tears to your Physick flask.
Follow the river outside the church to a Smithing Stone [2] in the middle of a fight between wolves and a Runebear.
Use the sending gate hidden in a bush at the opposite end of the river. After you arrive, open the door and grab the Bestial Sanctum grace, but don't rest at it.
Talk to Gurranq. He doesn't have any dialogue yet, but interacting with him unlocks D, Hunter of the Dead's inventory early.
🏆 Rest at the Bestial Sanctum grace and accept Melina's invitation to Roundtable Hold.
Now that you've arrived at the main hub, you can talk to the NPCs that are here:
Optional: Meet Gideon Ofnir and exhaust his dialogue.
MISSABLE: Talk to Corhyn and answer "I see it" to learn the Prayer gesture.
Talk to D, Hunter of the Dead. Optionally, talk to him about himself if you interacted with Gurranq earlier.
Optional: Talk to Diallos.
Optional: Talk to Hewg. Ask him about the chains on his legs, then ask if he's a prisoner.
Talk to Fia and let her hold you twice. During the second embrace, choose to talk in secret.

Note: Each time you let her hold you, you'll receive a Baldachin's Blessing. While carrying this item, your maximum HP is reduced by 5%, so make sure to use it after every interaction with her to remove its debuff.
MISSABLE: Reload the area, then interact with Ensha outside Gideon's study to learn the What Do You Want? gesture.
Optional: Exhaust Gideon Ofnir's dialogue in his study.
Optional: Find the Twin Maiden Husks and buy any items you need from them.
Return to Bestial Sanctum and pass time until morning at the grace. Follow the downhill path past the Black Blade Kindred and pick up the Golden Seed along the path.
Head east from the golden tree to find a stone astrolabe with Starlight Shards on your right side, near the cliff edge.
Drop down the cliff south of the astrolabe, then head down the slope near the cliff. Across the bridge at the bottom, you'll find the Lenne's Rise grace.
Use the spiritspring next to the tower while facing west to reach a cemetery with Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [3], Golden Rune [6], and a Golden Rune [8].
Use the spiritspring while facing east to enter the tower from its balcony. Loot the chest at the top level to obtain a Memory Stone.
Optional: You can do the Lenne's Rise rune farm if you need some quick runes for an item or upgrade.
Travel to the Third Church of Marika and follow the path past the Troll to a large arching ruin. Under it sits a wagon with Magic Grease.
Talk to Kenneth Haight on top of the arching ruin.
On the cliff accessible from the top of the ruin lies a cemetery with 3x Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], 2x Golden Rune [4], Golden Rune [6], and Fevor's Cookbook [1].
Return to the church and head along the beach until you reach a Giant Crab feasting on a corpse with Strip of White Flesh x3.
Climb the rocky ledges at the end of the beach and enter the round building southwest into the woods. Take the lift down and activate the Siofra River Well Depths grace.
Return to the church again (it's faster) and follow the south path into the woods to a stele with Map: Limgrave, East on the left side.
Pick up the Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [4] below the Runebear (it only attacks if you get too close).
Next to a wagon farther along the path is a corpse with Thin Beast Bones x3.
Continue west from the wagon to find a Golden Rune [1] at the base of a gibbet guarded by bats.
Up the slope southeast of the gibbet is a scarab that drops Ash of War: Ground Slam.
Pick up Spiked Cracked Tear and Greenspill Crystal Tear from the basin in front of the Minor Erdtree.
Go back down the slope and follow the howling to Mistwood Ruins:
Pick up the Golden Rune [2] in a corner of the ruins.
In the tower in the middle sits a chest with a Smithing Stone [2].
Go down the cellar by the sleeping Runebear for a chest containing the Axe Talisman.
Return to the path and follow it to a glowing message, then head northeast into the woods to find the Nomadic Merchant (East Limgrave).
Return to the path again and follow it until you see the Fort Haight West grace.
Head up the slope to the fort and pick up the Golden Seed near the entrance.
On the small beach southwest of the fort, you'll find a Golden Rune [1].
Continue southwest to a cemetery with 4x Golden Rune [1], 2x Golden Rune [2], Golden Rune [3], and a Golden Rune [4].
From the cemetery, head north-northwest until you come to a graveyard. In front of the largest gravestone is a Sacrificial Twig.
On a ledge northwest of the gravestone, you'll find a random Demi-Human drop (this item may be bugged).
Travel to Gatefront and explore the ruins:
Pick up Lordsworn's Greatsword from the chest in the nearby carriage.
In the ruins opposite the carriage sits a corpse with Ruin Fragment x3.
Loot Map: Limgrave, West from the stele in the middle.
In the lower south part of the ruins lies a cellar with Ash of War: Storm Stomp and Whetstone Knife.
Pick up Flail from the chest in the second carriage.
Follow the road through the ruins downhill to discover the Agheel Lake North grace on the left side.
Pass time until morning, then continue along the road to find an Arteria Leaf to the left of a telescope.
Roll into the yellow shrub to reveal Boc. Exhaust his dialogue to receive Mushroom x10.
Continue along the road to find a scarab that drops Ash of War: Determination.
On the right side of the bridge lies a Smithing Stone [1].
Cross the bridge, then follow the cliff edge on the right to a chair with a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
On a ledge overlooking the tip of the lake, past some Giant Crabs, you'll find the Agheel Lake South grace.
A small campsite with Sliver of Meat lies just west of the grace.
From the campsite, head southwest past the clashing enemies and down a rocky slope to find Crab Eggs on the cliff edge.
Go back up the slope, then head right until the area splits in two paths. Follow the downward slope first to a corpse with Ruin Fragment x3.
Head back and follow the upper path to a ledge with the Large Club, surrounded by Demi-Humans.
Use the spiritspring near the cliff while facing southeast to land on a broken pillar. Up the ledge, you'll reach the Bridge of Sacrifice grace.
Loot the Stonesword Key and Smithing Stone [1] x3 on the bridge.
Head back across to find Irina next to the road. Exhaust her dialogue, then agree to deliver her letter to receive Irina's Letter.
Continue down the road and pick up the Strip of White Flesh guarded by three dogs and a Troll.
Loot the Morning Star in the carriage, then the Golden Rune [2] and Smithing Stone [2] from the nearby corpses.
Kill the scarab on the road to obtain Ash of War: Mighty Shot.
When the road opens into a field, you'll discover the Castle Morne Rampart grace on the left side.
The Nomadic Merchant (Weeping Peninsula) sits just near the grace.
Pass time until morning at the grace, then follow the road through the hole in the rampart to a stele with Map: Weeping Peninsula.
Pick up Golden Seed from a ledge on the right side, just past the map stele.
Kill the Archer Golem (doesn't respawn). Then head toward the southeast beach to find Somber Smithing Stone [2] and Arteria Leaf near some hostile jellyfish.
Northeast of the beach is a poison swamp. Climb the tallest boulder in the swamp for a Golden Rune [4].
In the woods past the swamp, you'll see a teleporting scarab. Kill it with a Kukri to obtain Poison Mist.
At the top of the slope past the woods is a Smithing Stone [1] guarded by a Scaly Misbegotten.
Return to Castle Morne Rampart and follow the slope west of the grace to a cottage with Yellow Ember in front.
Continue northwest from the cottage and descend the gravestones in the cliff. Kill the scarab at the bottom to obtain Lightning Strike.
Return to the cottage and follow the dirt path to a village. Turn left before entering to find a campfire by the cliff and a Golden Rune [2].
Continue along the cliff edge to discover the Ailing Village Outskirts grace up on a ledge.
Pick up Flame Crest Wooden Shield from an empty cottage in the village.
Head into the church near the village. Loot The Flame of Frenzy and Sacred Tear, but be wary of the rats.
Return to Castle Morne Rampart and head up the north-northwest slope. In front of a gibbet on the cliff, you'll find Rainbow Stone x5.
Grab the South of the Lookout Tower grace on the ledge behind the pond with dogs around it.
Follow the rocky path west and across a bridge until you reach the church at the top. Grab the Church of Pilgrimage grace and Sacred Tear inside.
Optional: Talk to Melina at the Church of Pilgrimage grace.
Pick up Gilded Iron Shield and Blood Grease x2 from the small graveyard outside the church.
Head down the slope toward the mausoleum, keeping along the cliff wall on the left until you reach the Tombsward grace on a ledge.
Enter the church at the top of the slope near the mausoleum to grab the Fourth Church of Marika grace and Sacred Tear inside.
Go back down the slope, then head southwest toward a shack near the beach to grab the Isolated Merchant's Shack grace.
Buy a Lantern from the Isolated Merchant (Weeping Peninsula) if you can spare the runes. If not, you can buy it later.
On the beach, you can find a Golden Rune [5], and a Golden Rune [1] behind a fallen tree.
Continue along the beach for a Golden Rune [2] surrounded by Land Octopuses.
Travel to the Church of Elleh and talk to Kale about the howling in Mistwood to learn the Finger Snap gesture.
Locate Blaidd at the top of Mistwood Ruins. Use the Finger Snap gesture below him, then talk to him after he jumps down.
Optional: Return to Kale and talk to him about Blaidd.
Travel to Agheel Lake South and pick up the Golden Rune [2] in front of a gibbet just south of the grace.
Enter the evergaol at the top of the slope, then kill Bloodhound Knight Darriwil for Bloodhound's Fang and 1,900 runes.

Optional: Blaidd's summon sign can be found in the evergaol if you spoke to him in Mistwood Ruins. (It's worth noting that summoning an NPC is never needed to progress a questline and will result in 25% fewer runes.)
MISSABLE: After the fight, talk to Blaidd to receive a Somber Smithing Stone [2], then speak with him again to unlock a talisman for sale later.
From Stormhill Shack, follow the uphill road to a scarab and kill it for Ash of War: Wild Strikes.
On a ledge under the leftmost arch of the massive bridge, you'll find a Lump of Flesh.
Past the massive bridge is a broken span that once connected to Liurnia. At the end of it sits a corpse with Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [7].
Drop down to the area below the span and kill the scarab near the right edge to obtain Ash of War: Storm Wall.
Continue up the nearby slope until you reach the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace.
Head inside the church to the southwest to pick up a Sacred Tear.
Talk to Thops and spare him 10 runes. Optionally, select "Talk", then speak to him about the academy glintstone key.
Outside the church is a ravine path. At the end of the upper left side of the ravine, you'll find Warming Stone x3.
In front of a gravestone on the opposite hill across the ravine, you'll pick up the Academy Scroll.
Head down the ravine path to a camp with Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook [1] and Smoldering Butterfly x6 (in a tent).
Continue downhill and activate the Liurnia Lake Shore grace.
Climb the slanted rock next to the grace and jump onto the gravestones in the cliff face to reach a Sacrificial Twig.
Buy a Lantern from the Nomadic Merchant (South Liurnia) if you didn't get it earlier.
Follow the watery path lined with broken arcades and fences until you reach a stele with Map: Liurnia, East.
Continue along the path until you notice the Laskyar Ruins grace on your right side.
Pick up Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook [2] from the corpse near the grace.
Grab the Smithing Stone [3] beside the stairs to the building with spires northwest of the grace, then use the sending gate inside.
After arriving, head up to grab the South Raya Lucaria Gate grace and Meeting Place Map.
Head down the bridge and pick up the Smithing Stone [3] to the left of the enemies past the spiked barricades.
Continue down the nearby stairs, then head southeast at the bottom to find a Golden Seed.
From the golden tree, head southeast until the town is on your left, then continue along the outskirts to find the Academy Gate Town grace.
Pick up Map: Liurnia, North from the stele near the grace.
West of the grace is a larger tree. From that tree, go north to find Diallos on the northern outskirts and talk to him.
On a church roof just northwest of Diallos is a scarab that drops a Somber Smithing Stone [2].
Use the sending gate in the isolated building north-northwest of the scarab. After arriving, pick up Map: Liurnia, West from the stele.
Just southwest of the map stele lies the Northern Liurnia Lake Shore grace.
Follow the dirt path north-northeast through Kingsrealm Ruins and hit the illusory wall at the end to discover the Road to the Manor grace behind it.
Optional: Exhaust Iji's dialogue, then select "Please take care" and "Talk".

If you exhausted Blaidd's dialogue after killing Darriwil, tell him that Blaidd sent you to unlock the Carian Filigreed Crest for purchase. Otherwise, it'll be available after entering Ranni's service.
Note: Don't buy any Somberstones from him; you'll have one of each by the end of this section.
Return to the Northern Liurnia Lake Shore and head east-southeast across the lake. A chair with a Somber Smithing Stone [3] sits past the leftmost bridge pillar.
Head south from the chair until you reach the Gate Town North grace on the remains of some roofs.
Continue east-southeast toward a round building, then once you reach it, go east into the woods to find a building with Smithing Stone [3] x3 inside.
On the shore east of the building, you'll discover the Eastern Liurnia Lake Shore grace.
From the grace, head south-southwest to find Smithing Stone [3] x3 behind the magic Miranda Blossom on your right.
Return to the grace and follow the dirt path to a fork. Take the right path downhill to grab the Study Hall Entrance grace inside a building.
Below the tip of a slanted rock outside the building is a scarab that drops a Somber Smithing Stone [3].
Return to the fork and follow the other path uphill until you reach the church at the top. Activate the Church of Vows grace in front of it.
Talk to Miriel in the church. Optionally, exhaust his dialogue about Radagon, then about Rennala.

Note: Give him the Academy Scroll and any future scrolls or prayerbooks to unlock their spells for purchase. Scrolls can also be given to Sellen or Seluvis (and prayerbooks to Corhyn or Miriel), but Miriel never moves and is the only NPC to accept both types.
Pick up the Gold Sewing Needle and Golden Tailoring Tools from the chest in the church.
At the edge of the cliff behind the church sits a corpse with Stormhawk Feather x5.
Pick up the Grave Violet in front of a dead tree at the top of the hillside.
Optional: Talk to Varre at The First Step, answer "I'll fly straight and true!", then exhaust his dialogue.
Head around the building south of Varre and drop down next to the broken pillar to find Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot x2 on a ledge below the cliff.
Drop down and head toward the gibbets to find a Smithing Stone [1] next to a bottomless pit.
Just east-northeast of the pit lies the Dragon-Burnt Ruins:
Use Torrent to get inside the rightmost ruin and open the chest in the cellar to obtain the Twinblade.
In a corner just east past the rightmost ruin lies a corpse with Crab Eggs.
Go inside the ruined tower to find a Stonesword Key guarded by a rat.
Pick up the Golden Rune [2] next to the tower.
Head down the cellar full of rats and open the trap chest to be transported to Sellia Crystal Tunnel.
After arriving in Sellia, open the chest in front of you for Gravity Stone Fan x6 and Gravity Stone Chunk x3.
Crouch down and exit the hut toward the right side. Continue downward while crouched to reach the Sellia Crystal Tunnel grace.
Pick up Rot Grease from the corner of the room.
Exit the tunnel and head south-southwest toward the glowing footprints. Kill the invisible scarab to obtain Poison Armament.

Note: An easy way to deal with invisible scarabs is to mount up on Torrent and holding R2 or Shift + Left Click to charge a Heavy Attack along its path. When timed right, it should die running into your weapon.
Pick up Rune Arc from the small island with a thin tree in the rot swamp.
Continue southwest from the island to discover the Inner Aeonia grace.
Head toward the large scarab northwest of the grace, then go through the ravine to find a Somber Smithing Stone [5] in front of some glintstone crystals.
Exit the ravine, then follow the west wall to the corner of the swamp. On a root in the corner is a corpse with Sacramental Bud.
Just south-southeast of the corner lies the Street of Sages Ruins:
Head down the cellar in the ruin closest to the corner for a chest with Rock Sling.
Loot the Perfumer Traveler's Set and Perfume Bottle from the ruin in the middle.
In the ruined tower, you'll find the Meteorite Staff and a Golden Rune [4].
Head around the wall southeast of the ruined tower to discover the Aeonia Swamp Shore grace on a ledge near the shore.
Ride southeast from the grace to find a teleporting scarab on a small island in the rot. Kill it to obtain Ash of War: Poisonous Mist.
Southwest of the island, in the distance, is a small mushroom-covered mountain. Head around it to find a Golden Rune [3] guarded by putrid Miranda Sprouts.
Climb the mushroom-covered mountain to find a Golden Rune [4] at the top, overlooking the swamp.
East-southeast below the mountain lies a small campsite. Destroy the wagon there to find Crab Eggs x4 underneath.
Continue east from the campsite to discover the Southern Aeonia Swamp Bank grace behind a mushroom-covered branch.
Pass time until morning, then head southwest to find the Nomadic Merchant (South Caelid) by the road.
Pick up Map: Caelid from the stele next to the road.
Follow the southeast path near the stele to a Golden Seed.
Return to the grace and head northwest to find Smithing Stone [4] x3, Sacramental Bud x2, and a Rune Arc on some chairs at the shore.
Ride north-northeast from the chairs to pick up Aeonian Butterfly and Somber Smithing Stone [4] from the corpses between two trees in the swamp.
Continue up the nearby slope and kill the exploding scarab for Ash of War: Sacred Ring of Light.
Travel to Roundtable Hold and talk to Roderika in front of the fireplace.
Talk to Hewg about Roderika.
Return to Roderika and tell her what the blacksmith said.
Talk to Hewg about Roderika, then ask if he'll watch over her; your answer doesn't matter.
Reload the area to find them in the same room. Roderika will now offer to upgrade your spirit ashes.
Optional: Talk to Hewg about Roderika now that she's become a spirit tuner.
Talk to Diallos, who is now back at Roundtable Hold.

Note: At this point, you should have eight flasks upgraded to +5 and enough materials to upgrade any Somber weapon to +5. For beginners, I'd go with the Bloodhound's Fang (requires 18 Strength and 17 Dexterity) until you find a weapon you like.
Optional: Here are some steps I didn't include. I wouldn't bother with them unless you know what you're doing:
Get the Gold Scarab for 20% more runes from enemies. You'll need to kill the duo boss in Abandoned Cave in Caelid to obtain it.
Cheese the Night's Cavalry on the bridge near Lenne's Rise to ride off the cliff.
Grab the Dectus Medallion (Right) and Radagon's Soreseal from Fort Faroth.
Kill Elder Dragon Greyoll with a bleed weapon and use a Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot (and Gold Scarab) before she dies.

Obtain the Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [1] in Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel and Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [2] in Sealed Tunnel (note that going for the latter will trigger the festival in Caelid, which will progress quite a few questlines).
